relationships.purpose: Counterparty ownership is required for supervisory aggregation.
Pledged collateral must be linked to the account.
Valuation must identify the collateral being valued.

controls.name: haircut_non_negative
controls.rule: Haircut rate must be greater than or equal to zero.
